creator: olivier@cochard.me
text:
Can you replace my MAKE_ARGS+= line with this new one:

MAKE_ARGS+=    PREFIX=${PREFIX} CFLAGS="${CFLAGS}" LDFLAGS="${LDFLAGS}"

This will permit to support CFLAGS and LDFLAGS.

Thanks,
